label: Set default for email on user
summary: Sets default on column email of table user

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'email'
)

execute.sql:
ALTER TABLE "public"."user"
ALTER COLUMN "email" SET DEFAULT 'unknown@example.com'

postcheck.description: verify column "email" default matches expected value
postcheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'email'
    AND column_default = '''unknown@example.com''::text'
)

label: Drop column phone from user
summary: Drops extra column phone from table user

precheck.sql:
SELECT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'phone'
)

postcheck.sql:
SELECT NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM information_schema.columns
  WHERE table_schema = 'public'
    AND table_name = 'user'
    AND column_name = 'phone'
)
